issue_summary: Graph.java: break out mutation- and edge-specific methods into subinterfaces * Network.java: edge-specific methods (extends Graph) * MutableGraph.java: mutation methods for Graph (extends Graph) * MutableNetwork.java: mutation methods for Network (extends Network) Graph<N, E> becomes Graph<N>.
javadoc_before:
/** * A {@link Graph} whose contents will never change. Instances of this class should be obtained * with {@link #copyOf(Graph)}. * *

The time complexity of {@code edgesConnecting(node1, node2)} is O(min(outD_node1, inD_node2)). * * @author James Sexton * @author Joshua O'Madadhain * @author Omar Darwish * @param Node parameter type * @param Edge parameter type */
javadoc_after:
/** * A {@link Graph} whose relationships are constant. Instances of this class may be obtained * with {@link #copyOf(Graph)}. * *

The time complexity of {@code edgesConnecting(node1, node2)} is O(min(outD_node1, inD_node2)). * * @author James Sexton * @author Joshua O'Madadhain * @author Omar Darwish * @param Node parameter type */
